fields.validation_summary: Validated 2026-06-27 with updated tools. cargo test -p ticket-api --lib: 67 passed/0 failed incl. update_allows_reverse_transitions_from_terminal_states. Live CLI: reverse in-implementation->ready succeeded; unconnected ready->done correctly rejected (schema validation). AC1 reverse-movement, AC2 reject-unconnected, AC3 regression-coverage all met.
